# Sales Data Analysis using Spark

## Objective
Analyze sales trends

### Steps
- Load data from ADLS
- Transform using Spark
- Generate KPIs

### Code

```python
df = spark.read.csv("abfss://container/file.csv")
print("Hello") 
print("World")
```

from pyspark.sql import SparkSession

# Create a SparkSession
spark1 = SparkSession.builder.appName("synapseworkouts").getOrCreate()
data = [
    (1, "Rajesh", 25),
    (2, "Vimal", 30),
    (3, "Charlie", 35),
    (4, "David", 40)
]

df = spark.createDataFrame(data, ["id", "name", "age"])
df.show()

#Read from Data Lake
df = spark.read.format("csv").option("inferschema",True).load("abfss://raw@batch25synapseadls.dfs.core.windows.net/txns") \
.toDF("txnid","txndate","custid","amount","category","product","city","state","paytype")
df.printSchema()
df.show()

from pyspark.sql.functions import count,sum,round
df1 = df.groupBy("state").agg(count("txnid").alias("TotalTrans"),round(sum("amount"),2).alias("TotalSales"))
df1.show()

#Write into ADLS
df1.write.format("parquet").save("abfss://raw@batch25synapseadls.dfs.core.windows.net/salesreport")
print("Data Written into Data Lake")
